title: Tales of scale
description: A HTTYD, New berk's Dawn modpack.
body:
# Tales of Scale
![Banner for ToS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08ce58c3fce021422cc1ff249dafa2887a861663_0.webp)
Tales of Scale is a Cozy, Exploration HTTYD mod! This mod will try and drive your sense of curiosity, adventure, and so on, whilst also giving a Vanilla/Vanilla+ feeling in the mix. You can start a Cozy Tavern, Become a dragon rider, or delve into long lost structures. It's your story to write. 

# Mods 
- A Light 50+ Mods!
- Beautiful Generation with Terralith 
- Tweaks to spawn rates to make dragons more uncommon/rare to find and encourage exploration.
- Decent amount of mods that help with both optimization and running the modpack
- Mods for multiplayer fun
- Leveling
- Much more…
